g.text: veth Netlink Message Structure | sizeof=100 bytes

ul.li: Memory Alignment: All rtattr structures are RTA_ALIGN'd to 4B.

Nesting Hierarchy:
IFLA_LINKINFO (Nested container)
IFLA_INFO_KIND -> Driver identifier string ("veth")
IFLA_INFO_DATA -> Driver-specific attributes
VETH_INFO_PEER -> Encapsulated interface config for the peer.
Cache Line Impact: The IFLA_INFO_DATA start marks the 64-byte boundary.
